title: Communauté d'agglomération du Saint-Quentinois
summary: Communauté d'agglomération du Saint-Quentinois is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Saint-Quentin. It is located in the Aisne department, in the Hauts-de-France region, northern France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Saint-Quentin. Its area is 293.3 km2. Its population was 80,263 in 2019, of which 53,570 in Saint-Quentin proper.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération du Saint-Quentinois is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Saint-Quentin. It is located in the Aisne department, in the Hauts-de-France region, northern France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Saint-Quentin. Its area is 293.3 km2. Its population was 80,263 in 2019, of which 53,570 in Saint-Quentin proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 39 communes:
